name: create-placeholder-media
description: Downloads random images from picsum.photos and saves them as Drupal Media entities (type: image). Creates persistent placeholder images for demo content, capability scripts, and agent-generated content. Images are downloaded once and stored permanently in the media library.

parameters.name: COUNT
parameters.description: Number of placeholder images to create

parameters.name: PREFIX
parameters.description: Name prefix for media entities (e.g., 'Hero banner', 'Card image')

preconditions: Internet access is available (downloads from picsum.photos)
